articles.title: Notice about upcoming new format for GitHub App installation tokens

articles.title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model V4 matters
articles.snippet: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. Like DeepSeek’s previous models, V4 is open source, meaning it is available…
articles.ai_summary: DeepSeek unveiled its new V4 model, which can handle longer prompts and is designed for better text processing efficiency. This open-source model represents a significant advancement in AI capabilities, particularly for Chinese technology.
articles.why_it_matters: Advances open-source AI capabilities, challenging proprietary models.

articles.title: DeepSeek's new models are so efficient they'll run on a toaster ... by which we mean Huawei's NPUs
articles.snippet: Now available in preview, DeepSeek V4 cuts inference costs to a fraction of R1 Chinese AI darling DeepSeek is back with a new open weights large language model that promises performance to rival the best proprietary American LLMs. Perhaps more importantly, it claims to dramatically reduce inference costs and it extends support for Huawei's Ascend family of AI accelerators.…
articles.ai_summary: DeepSeek's V4 model, now in preview, promises to reduce inference costs significantly and support Huawei's AI accelerators. This positions DeepSeek as a strong competitor against leading American LLMs.
articles.why_it_matters: Reduces costs and enhances accessibility for AI deployment.

articles.title: Building Workforce AI Agents with Visier and Amazon Quick
articles.snippet: In this post, we show how connecting the Visier Workforce AI platform with Amazon Quick through Model Context Protocol (MCP) gives every knowledge worker a unified agentic workspace to ask questions in. Visier helps ground the workspace in live workforce data and the organizational context that surrounds it while letting your users act on the conversational results without switching tools.

articles.title: Learning Long-Term Motion Embeddings for Efficient Kinematics Generation
articles.snippet: Understanding and predicting motion is a fundamental component of visual intelligence. Although modern video models exhibit strong comprehension of scene dynamics, exploring multiple possible futures through full video synthesis remains prohibitively inefficient. We model scene dynamics orders of magnitude more efficiently by directly operating on a long-term motion embedding that is learned from large-scale trajectories obtained from tracker models. This enables efficient generation of long, re
articles.ai_summary: Researchers have developed a method for efficiently predicting motion by using long-term motion embeddings derived from large-scale trajectories. This approach significantly enhances the efficiency of video synthesis for scene dynamics.
articles.why_it_matters: Improves motion prediction efficiency, crucial for advancements in visual intelligence.
